mining.name: Rocky
mining.description: A fist-sized pebble golem that clatters happily behind you.

woodcutting.name: Acorn
woodcutting.description: A glossy red squirrel that rides on fallen branches.

fishing.name: Bubbles
fishing.description: A tiny otter pup that smells faintly of the river.

cooking.name: Cinder
cooking.description: A soot-cheeked imp that steals crusts of bread.

smithing.name: Ingot
smithing.description: A stubby iron sprite, still warm from the forge.

alchemy.name: Fizz
alchemy.description: A softly glowing wisp that lives in a potion bottle.

foraging.name: Bramble
foraging.description: A round hedgehog with a leaf stuck to one spine.

agility.name: Zephyr
agility.description: A whirl of dust that never quite settles.

swimming.name: Ripple
swimming.description: A shimmer of water that paddles along beside you.

bartering.name: Sterling
bartering.description: A sleek magpie that hoards bright coins in your pack.

hunting.name: Scout
hunting.description: A lean hound that noses out the next trail.

carpentry.name: Chip
carpentry.description: A busy beaver that gnaws spare pegs into shape.

enchanting.name: Glimmer
enchanting.description: A tiny arcane wisp that trails glowing motes as it drifts behind you.

weaponry.name: Nick
weaponry.description: A tiny animated dagger that spins and parries at your heel.

defense.name: Bulwark
defense.description: A stout little turtle whose shell is a miniature tower shield.

marksmanship.name: Fletch
marksmanship.description: A sprite that lives in your quiver and whistles when the wind is right.

spellcraft.name: Cantrip
spellcraft.description: A curl of blue mana that orbits your shoulder, humming with power.

medicine.name: Sage
medicine.description: A palm-sized homunculus of bundled healing herbs.

thievery.name: Pilfer
thievery.description: A pocket imp that can't resist jiggling every lock it passes.
